questionHtml: Describe, in terms of acid-base theories, the type of reaction that takes place between the cobalt ion and water to form the complex ion.
markschemeHtml:
Lewis «acid-base reaction»

H2O: electron/e– pair donor

OR

Co2+: electron/e– pair acceptor

meta.title: Describe, in terms of acid-base theories, the type of reaction that takes place between the cobalt ion and water to form the complex ion.
